mapper.select:
SELECT id, create_time, name, age, sex, id_card, mobile, patient_user_id, is_delete FROM t_hos_sick
and id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t1.`name`, t1.age, t1.sex FROM t_hos_sick t1 LEFT JOIN t_hos_revisit t2 ON t2.hos_sick_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN t_hos_visit t3 ON t3.hos_sick_id = t1.id WHERE (t2.doctor_user_id = #{doctorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR t3.doctor_user_id = #{doctorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND is_delete = '0' AND t1.NAME LIKE #{sickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t1.`name`, t1.age, t1.sex FROM t_hos_sick t1 LEFT JOIN t_hos_revisit t2 ON t2.hos_sick_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN t_hos_visit t3 ON t3.hos_sick_id = t1.id WHERE (t2.doctor_user_id = #{doctorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR t3.doctor_user_id = #{doctorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND is_delete = '0' AND t1.NAME LIKE #{sickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
